steps.title: Use the stated goal
steps.content: The student wants to emphasize Tepeapulco's 2020 population. The relevant note states that Tepeapulco's population was 46,065 in 2020.

steps.title: Select the relevant sentence
steps.content: Choice A discusses services but omits the figure. Choice B uses the 2010 population, not the 2020 population. Choice C mentions 2020 but focuses on municipalities. Choice D directly gives the 2020 population. The answer is D.
